summary: Planned a non-mutating repair path for open canonical PR #68677. The hydrated preflight shows #68677 is the active focused contributor PR for the image resize reprocessing bug, is explicitly security_sensitive=false, has maintainer_can_modify=true, has passing relevant checks, and has author follow-up addressing the concrete Greptile parseInt review nit. The validator reported a security-sensitive target failure for #68677, but the matching hydrated preflight item explicitly says security_sensitive=false, so route_security is not safe under the repair rules. To avoid an unsafe target-scoped fix mutation while preserving the complete executable repair plan, the fix artifact action is cluster-scoped and non-mutating, with #68677 retained as the canonical source PR and candidate fix inside hydrated refs and the fix artifact.

actions.reason: #68677 is the best surviving canonical contributor PR and should remain the canonical repair target; route_security is not safe because the hydrated preflight explicitly marks #68677 security_sensitive=false.
Emit the complete executable repair artifact at cluster scope so Clownfish can repair or refresh the contributor branch without unsafe route_security or blocked GitHub mutations.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair and refresh contributor PR #68677 as the canonical narrow fix for repeated per-turn image resize processing. Preserve nitinjwadhawan's branch and credit, keep the patch scoped to tool image resize caching and its tests, and do not merge or close anything in this job.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(tool-images): cache resize results on current sanitizer path
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
Repair contributor PR #68677 as the canonical fix for repeated image resize processing on session history. The fix should keep the SHA-256 keyed, byte-bounded resize-result cache in src/agents/tool-images.ts, retain regression coverage in src/agents/tool-images.test.ts and src/agents/tool-images.log.test.ts, and preserve the documented bare-integer byte parsing behavior for OPENCLAW_IMAGE_RESIZE_CACHE_MAX_BYTES.

## Source And Credit
Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/68677
Author credit: nitinjwadhawan
Related prior attempts: #64514, #23706
Canonical bug thread: #64418

## Validation
- pnpm -s vitest run src/agents/tool-images.test.ts src/agents/tool-images.log.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed

## Notes
This job is allowed to fix or raise a PR only. It must not comment, label, close, merge, force-push, or bypass checks.
credit_notes: Preserve contributor credit for nitinjwadhawan as the author of source PR #68677.
PR #68677 explicitly relates to prior source PR #64514 by EronFan and earlier attempt #23706 by echoVic; mention them as prior attempts only if a replacement PR is opened.
Do not close or supersede #68677 unless a replacement PR is actually opened and credits nitinjwadhawan and the original source PR URL.
